overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town during a dramatic sunset. The character traverses elevated walkways, a central town square with a wooden gazebo, and narrow cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed buildings and fire braziers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway along town fortifications

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated path with grass verges beside stone walls, approaching a guard standing watch

notable_agents.action: guard in red tunic standing watch beside the stone wall

entered.detail: rough stone wall running along the elevated walkway
grassy verge with tall weeds and vegetation
tall stone tower with pointed roof illuminated by golden sunset light
half-timbered building with dark wooden beams and lit windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an elevated stone pathway at dusk, with grass verges on one side and a stone retaining wall on the other. Medieval stone towers rise in the distance against a pink and purple sunset sky, while a guard stands watch ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge with railings approaching town square

events.description: transitions from grassy ledge to wooden bridge with dark railings

agents.ego_description: crossing wooden bridge with stone balustrades, approaching the open town square

entered.detail: dark wooden railings with vertical posts along the walkway
low stone wall with wooden cap on the right side

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to a wooden bridge with dark railings overlooking the town below. The stone tower shifts to the left as the camera advances, revealing the opening to a large town square ahead with timber-framed buildings visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: central town square with wooden gazebo and market stalls

events.description: enters open town square from the bridge walkway
turns right to circle around the central gazebo structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling square, circling the central wooden gazebo and passing market stalls with green awnings

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress and hat walking across the square
man sitting on stone bench near the gazebo

entered.detail: octagonal wooden bandstand with pointed shingle roof and open sides
market stall with green canvas awning and wooden frame
patterned cobblestone plaza with circular design

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a spacious town square paved with patterned cobblestones, dominated by a central wooden gazebo. The square is moderately busy with townspeople walking about and market stalls with green awnings visible. The camera circles the gazebo as the sun continues to set, casting an orange glow across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with timber buildings and fire braziers

events.description: ascends wide stone staircase leading to upper street level
enters narrow street lined with burning fire braziers and closely packed timber buildings

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs into a narrow street illuminated by fire braziers, continuing through the crowded medieval quarter

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow headscarf descending the stairs
man in red tunic walking up the cobblestone street

entered.detail: wide stone steps with low retaining walls on either side
burning fire pit in iron cage providing warm light
large timber-framed building with illuminated windows and stone foundation

segments.scene_description: Leaving the square, Geralt ascends a wide stone staircase into a narrower, more enclosed street. The environment shifts to a densely built quarter with timber-framed buildings and burning fire braziers casting flickering light. The crowd density increases as the character navigates through opposing pedestrian traffic in the medieval alleyway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated stone perimeter at dusk into the densely packed heart of a medieval town. It begins with Geralt walking along a stone pathway flanked by grass and retaining walls, with distant towers silhouetted against a pink and purple sunset. As the path transitions into a wooden bridge, the perspective shifts to reveal a sprawling town square framed by timber-framed buildings. The scene then opens into the spacious, cobblestone square where the camera circles a central wooden gazebo amidst market stalls and townspeople under a deepening orange glow. Finally, the camera ascends a wide stone staircase, leaving the open square behind to enter a narrow, enclosed alleyway lined with burning fire braziers and crowded pedestrian traffic.
